title: draba verna var. cabillonensis
intro: Draba verna var. cabillonensis, also known as Alpine Whitlow Grass, is a subspecies of the Draba verna plant, a small, low-growing flowering plant in the mustard family. This plant is rich in glucosinolates, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Draba verna var. cabillonensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant effects. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in oil for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential and effects.
